title: Blue Denim
writer: Edith Sommer, Philip Dunne, James Leo Herlihy
actors: Carol Lynley, Brandon De Wilde, Macdonald Carey
plot: Fairly-typical 1950s teenagers Arthur Bartley and Janet Willard find their lives turned upside-down when Janet becomes pregnant. Arthur is desperate to tell his parents of the predicament he and Janet are in, but when he can't man...
